skmle 0.1.0
  • Get Started
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with skmle
    • Benchmarking skmle Against SurvSparse
  • Changelog

Package index

Main modeling functions

skmle()
Fit a Transformed Hazards Model by SMKLE
skmle_cv()
Select the Bandwidth by Cross-Validation
kee_cox()
Fit a Cox-Type KEE Model
kee_additive()
Fit an Additive Hazards KEE Model

Simulation

sim_skmle_data()
Simulate Sparse Longitudinal Survival Data

Model summaries and plots

plot(<skmle>)
Plot the estimated baseline function for skmle model
summary(<skmle>)
Summary for skmle object
summary(<kee>)
Summary for kee object
print(<skmle>)
Print skmle object
print(<kee>)
Print kee object
print(<summary.skmle>)
Print summary of skmle object
print(<summary.kee>)
Print summary of kee object
